FURINA_RELIC_SOLOISTS_SOLICITATION.title: Soloist's Solicitation
FURINA_RELIC_SOLOISTS_SOLICITATION.descr: At the start of combat, set your Arkhe to Ousia. At the start of your turn, gain 1 Salute.
FURINA_RELIC_SOLOISTS_SOLICITATION.flavo: A grand stage awaits, and the show must go on.
FURINA_RELIC_LET_THE_PEOPLE_REJOICE.desc: At the start of combat, set your Arkhe to Ousia. At the start of your turn, gain 1 Salute. Whenever you switch your Arkhe, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
FURINA_RELIC_LET_THE_PEOPLE_REJOICE.flav: When all voices converge as one, that is when judgment descends.
